transcript: Speaker A (Employer): Ramesh, can you preheat the oven and chop the vegetables? Speaker B (Ramesh): Yes, ma'am. I'll preheat it and chop the vegetables right away. [Telugu] Meeru anukuntunnara nenu oka cook aina ilanti manchi English ala matladutunnanu ani? Meeru anukuntunnaru ee cook evaritho matladutunnadu ani. Nenu SpeakX app lo English nerchukuntunnanu. English correct ga nerchukovali ante mee istam prakaram practice chesede possible. Evaraina meetho practice chesi mee mistakes ni correct cheste appudu inka fast ga nerchukovachu. Anduke nenu naa pani ayyaka SpeakX app lo naa AI teacher tho English practice chesta. SpeakX English nerchukovadam ni chala easy ga malli fun ga chestundi. Valla AI teacher nannu judge cheyyadu. Mari naa mistakes ni correct chesi nannu improve chestundi. Anduke nenu oka nellalone manchi English maatladedi nerchukonnanu. [Are you wondering how I, being a cook, speak such good English? You might be wondering who this cook is talking to. I am learning English on the SpeakX app. To learn English correctly, practicing at your own convenience is key. If someone practices with you and corrects your mistakes, you can learn even faster. That's why, after my work, I practice English with my AI teacher on the SpeakX app. SpeakX makes learning English very easy and fun. Their AI teacher doesn't judge me. Instead, it corrects my mistakes and helps me improve. That's why I learned to speak good English in just one month.]
on_screen_text: Cook Salary: 30,000/- with good English. Ramesh, Can You Preheat The Oven And Chop The Vegetables? Yes, Ma'am. I'll Preheat It And Chop The Vegetables Right Away. Meeru Anukuntunnara Nenu Cook Aina Ilanti Manchi English Ala Maatladutunnanu Ani Anukuntunnara Ee Cook Evaritho Maatladutunnadu Ani Nenu SpeakX App Lo English Nerchukuntunnanu. English Correct Ga Nerchukovali Ante Mee Istam Prakaram Practice Chesede Possible. Evaraina Meetho Practice Chesi Mee Mistakes Ni Correct Cheste Appudu Inka Fast Ga Nerchukovachu. Naa Pani Ayyaka SpeakX App Lo Naa AI Teacher Tho English Practice Chesta. SpeakX English Nerchukovadam Ni Chala Easy Ga Malli Fun Ga Chestundi. Valla AI Teacher Nannu Judge Cheyyadu. Mari Naa Mistakes Ni Correct Chesi Nannu Improve Chestundi. Anduke Nenu Oka Nellalone Manchi English Maatladedi Nerchukonnanu.
summary: A cook showcases his fluent English to his employer, then reveals he learned it using the SpeakX app. He explains how the app's AI teacher offers judgment-free practice and real-time corrections, enabling him to speak confidently within a month.
